name: I'm on Boot hill
hints: Boot Hill - the cemetery. A rattlesnake is here! Be careful.
DIG to uncover a grave. The rattlesnake may attack - deal with it first.
SHOO SNAK or KILL SNAK to deal with the rattlesnake before digging.
DIG reveals a grave (room 29) with gold coin and purple worm. W=road (17).
notes: Boot Hill cemetery with rattlesnake (dangerous). DIG reveals grave (room 29) with gold coin treasure. W=road (17).
